title: Mellow Saudi Arabian Butternut Squash Wrap
description: A funky twist on traditional Saudi Arabian dishes, this wrap features butternut squash and Mediterranean-friendly flavors in a ssam-wrap, evoking a sense of nostalgia, the glassy-jelly texture of the squash adds a unique element to the dish.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Toss the cubed butternut squash with 1 tablespoon of olive oil, salt, and black pepper on a baking sheet.
Roast the butternut squash in the oven for 30 minutes, or until tender and lightly browned.
Spread 2 tablespoons of hummus on each ssam wrap.
Top the hummus with roasted butternut squash, chopped cucumber, chopped tomato, and pickled turnips.
Sprinkle sumac over the top of each wrap.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Drizzle the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil over the wraps.
Serve the wraps immediately and enjoy.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
